Quantiles of estimates

Source: R/post_process.R
quantilesEstimate.Rd

Quantiles of estimates

Usage

quantilesEstimate(subFrame, probs)

Arguments

subFrame

A vibration data frame subset.

probs

Probability quantiles.

Value

A data frame with columns probs and estimate.
